SELECT kurtosis(value) AS kurtosis_value FROM (SELECT value FROM test_data WHERE value IS NOT NULL);
SELECT kurtosis(value) FROM (SELECT value FROM test_data UNION ALL SELECT value FROM other_data);
SELECT kurtosis(CASE WHEN value IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE value END) FROM test_data;
SELECT kurtosis(value) FROM (SELECT DISTINCT value FROM test_data WHERE value IS NOT NULL) AS distinct_values;
CREATE TABLE complex_data (id INT, value FLOAT);
SELECT kurtosis(value) FROM complex_data GROUP BY id;
WITH subquery AS (SELECT value FROM test_data WHERE value IS NOT NULL) SELECT kurtosis(value) FROM subquery;
